title: Mc_Amp.Zip
description: Changes Minecraft's music library to a analog horror
body:
# **How it works**
This pack changes the music library and title screen for a more unsettling experience. 

In order to have the music to work to the fullest extent I would recommend having this pack above anything that messes with the music and if its too loud you can turn it down like normal in the settings.

# **What its for**
This was made mostly for modpacks to have more of an atmosphere.

I recommend using [Golden Days](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days) with this pack to get the best experience.

# **Credits**
(I did not make ANY of this music and i only used it for the pack.)

[https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCINTnTeIUGC4b1DYHslQWcA](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCINTnTeIUGC4b1DYHslQWcA)
